overview.title: Connecting continents via air
descriptions: When time defines the outcome, air freight becomes more than speed, it becomes strategy.

DahNAY connects global markets through disciplined, time-sensitive air cargo solutions. From urgent consignments to high-value shipments, we ensure precision in movement, clarity in compliance and visibility at every milestone.
Across continents, across time zones, across critical deadlines, we move with control.

certifications.title: Prepared to handle your freight with precision
descriptions: Our operations are IATA-compliant, supported by DG-certified handling teams and aligned with global aviation security standards. With strict adherence to trade and customs compliance protocols, we ensure cargo is handled safely, securely and in full regulatory compliance at every stage of the journey.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.content: Find answers to common questions about our air freight services and how we can support your supply chain.

items.question: Do you offer door-to-door air freight services?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY provides complete air freight service solutions including door-to-door delivery. Our air freight forwarding ensures seamless pickup, customs clearance and final delivery.

items.question: What types of cargo can be shipped via air freight?
items.answer: We handle a wide range of cargo including high-value goods, perishables, pharmaceuticals and electronics. Our air cargo service also supports temperature-controlled air cargo for sensitive shipments.

items.question: What is the maximum weight allowed for air freight shipments?
items.answer: There is no fixed universal weight limit for air freight service, as capacity depends on aircraft type, route and cargo specifications, with flexible air freight solutions designed to accommodate both small consignments and high-value cargo air shipping requirements.

items.question: Do you provide packaging support for air freight?
items.answer: Yes, we offer professional packaging support tailored for air freight service, ensuring safety for fragile, high-value and temperature-sensitive cargo.

items.question: Is air freight safe for high-value or fragile goods?
items.answer: Our high-value cargo air shipping processes include secure handling, tracking and compliance protocols to ensure maximum safety.

items.question: What documents are required for air freight shipping?
items.answer: Typically, you will need an air waybill, commercial invoice, packing list and any required export or import documentation. Our air freight forwarding team assists with all paperwork.

items.question: Can DahNAY Logistics handle customs clearance for air shipments?
items.answer: Yes, we provide end-to-end air cargo service including customs clearance to ensure smooth and fast movement across borders.

overview.title: Your cargo. Our commitment.
descriptions: From raw materials to finished products, global trade travels by sea. DahNAY enables that movement with discipline, foresight and control.

Across major international trade corridors, we manage high-volume ocean freight with structured planning, regulatory clarity and end-to-end visibility. Whether containerised cargo or complex project shipments, we move scale without losing precision.
Because what moves the world should never be left to chance.

expertise.title: Core and value added services
expertise.content: From planning to delivery, our logistics experts manage every detail with precision. Your cargo moves safely, efficiently, and on time, every time.

expertiseItems.title: Ocean Freight Management
expertiseItems.description: Full Container Load (FCL) Less than Container Load (LCL) Consolidation & Deconsolidation Break-bulk cargo handling Cross-trade shipment coordination Charter vessel arrangements

expertiseItems.title: Specialised Cargo Execution
expertiseItems.description: Oversized and heavy-lift cargo, Open Top and Flat Rack container movements, Reefer (temperature-controlled) shipments, IMDG-compliant hazardous cargo handling, Industrial machinery & infrastructure movements

expertiseItems.title: CHA Activities
expertiseItems.description: Export & import documentation, Customs clearance coordination, HS classification support, International trade compliance management, Port supervision and milestone monitoring

expertiseItems.title: Multimodal & Inland Integration
expertiseItems.description: Port-to-door and door-to-port solutions, Inland haulage coordination, Rail–road–sea multimodal connectivity, Sea–Air hybrid routing during disruptions

expertiseItems.title: RoRo Finished Vehicles
expertiseItems.description: With seamless drive-on/drive-off movement, our RoRo services ensure efficiency at every stage, enabling smooth port-to-port and inland distribution.

whyDahnay.title: Why DahNAY for Sea freight?
whyDahnay.content: Ensure every shipment is precise, on time and fully optimised with DahNAY.

items.title: Extensive Network
items.content: Partnerships with leading airlines and agents across major destinations.

items.title: Speed & Reliability

certifications.title: Prepared to handle your freight with precision
descriptions: Our ocean freight services are backed by a comprehensive set of global certifications that ensure safety, transparency, and compliance at every stage.

We meet internationally recognised standards including ISO 9001 and ISO 14001, and adhere to HAZMAT and IMDG regulations for hazardous materials. We also support trade integrity through AEO certification, ISPM 15 compliance for wood packaging, and rigorous training and protocols in trade compliance and forklift operations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.content: Find answers to common questions about our sea freight services and how we can support your supply chain.

items.question: When should I choose sea freight over air freight?
items.answer: Choose sea freight service when cost efficiency is a priority and transit time is flexible, especially for bulk or heavy shipments.

items.question: What is the difference between FCL and LCL in sea freight?
items.answer: FCL sea freight service uses a full container for one shipment, while LCL sea freight service consolidates multiple shipments into a single container.

items.question: What ports and trade routes does DahNAY operate on?
items.answer: Our ocean freight service covers major global trade routes and Indian ports, ensuring reliable container shipping service connections.

items.question: Can sea freight handle oversized or heavy cargo?
items.answer: Yes, our maritime freight service supports oversized and heavy cargo through specialized containers and breakbulk cargo shipping.

items.question: Can I consolidate multiple shipments into one container?
items.answer: Yes, our LCL sea freight service allows consolidation, making it cost-effective for smaller shipments.

items.question: How early should I book a sea freight shipment?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 1 to 2 weeks in advance for smooth planning and availability in our sea cargo service.

From first-mile pickup to last-mile delivery, we connect supply chains across cities, regions and industrial corridors, keeping cargo moving without interruption.

items.question: When should I choose road transportation over air or sea freight?
items.answer: Road transport service is ideal for short to medium distances, domestic deliveries and time-sensitive shipments where flexibility is important.

items.answer: Yes, our road freight forwarding includes real-time tracking for complete visibility and flexibility.

items.question: What documents are required for road transportation?
items.answer: Common documents include invoice, e-way bill and transport permits. Our trusted road transport provider team assists with compliance.

items.question: Can DahNAY Logistics handle interstate and cross-border road transport?
items.answer: Yes, we offer seamless Full Truck Load (FTL) road transport service and Less Than Truck Load (LTL) road freight service across regions.

items.answer: We use a range of vehicles including full truckload, part truckload and specialized vehicles based on cargo requirements.

items.answer: Yes, DahNAY offers integrated warehousing and distribution solutions, including inventory management, storage and order fulfilment across key global locations.

items.question: How does DahNAY ensure shipment visibility?
items.answer: DahNAY provides real-time tracking, proactive updates and digital visibility tools that allow clients to monitor shipments across the supply chain.

items.question: How do you customize logistics solutions?
items.answer: DahNAY designs tailored logistics solutions based on cargo type, industry requirements, timelines and cost considerations, ensuring efficient and scalable supply chain operations.
